common.appDescription: Create beautiful animated wallpapers for iOS and iPadOS on any desktop computer
common.name: Name

home.notification: Blending Modes and Filters are out!
home.heroDescription: Create beautiful animated wallpapers for iOS and iPadOS on any desktop computer with CAPlayground.
home.readyDescription: Build your first animated wallpaper in minutes. No sign in required.
home.mostDownloadedDescription: See what the community loves most, then dive into the full gallery to discover more animated wallpapers for your devices.

editor.renameDescription: Update the name of your project.
editor.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the project and its editor data.

settings.autoClosePanel: Auto-close right panel on narrow screens
settings.exportCaFileDescription: Download a .zip containing your Background.ca and Floating.ca files.
settings.exportConfirm: I confirm that I created or have permission to use all content in this wallpaper.
settings.exportDescription: Export your wallpaper as a .ca file or .zip archive.
settings.exportTendiesDescription: Create a .tendies wallpaper file compatible with Nugget and Pocket Poster.
settings.export_step_showcase_desc: Submit the wallpaper if you want to showcase your work.
settings.export_step_test_desc: Apply the wallpaper to your device and test it.
settings.export_step_watch_desc: Watch the video on how to use Pocket Poster or Nugget.
settings.title: Settings
settings.updatePrompt: A new version is available. Please update from GitHub.

states.noStateOverrides: No state overrides for this layer.
states.stateOverrideHint: Select a state above to edit overrides.
states.title: States
states.transitionHint: Select a state and modify layer properties to create transitions.
states.appearanceSplitWarning: Light/Dark per state will make wallpaper not usable on iOS 16

layers.title: Layers
layers.gifVideoLayerOnly: GIFs must be imported via Video Layer…
layers.noLayers: No layers yet. Click + to add one.
layers.renameHint: Give this layer a nice new name.

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.selectHint: Select a layer to edit its properties.
inspector.flipDescription: When on, origin becomes top-left and Y increases down.

contentTab.title: Content
contentTab.opacityDescriptionBefore: Background opacity affects only this layer's background color fill (behind the content). For overall layer opacity (affects images, text, and sublayers), use

geometryTab.title: Geometry
geometryTab.animationsDisabled: Position and rotation fields are disabled because this layer has keyframe animations enabled. The values shown update live during playback.
geometryTab.flipDescription: Affects this layer's sublayers' coordinate system.
geometryTab.perspectiveDescription: Controls how the layer is projected in 3D space.

animationsTab.title: Animations
animationsTab.noKeyframesYet: No keyframes yet. Click "+ Add" to create one.

compositingTab.title: Compositing
compositingTab.opacityDescriptionBefore: Opacity affects the entire layer (content, background, and sublayers). If you only want to fade the background fill behind the content, use
compositingTab.masksDescription: Masks this layer's sublayers to its bounds.

emitterTab.title: Emitter
emitterTab.noCells: No cells. Add one to get started.

gyroTab.title: Gyro
gyroTab.gyroDescription: Enable gyroscope-based parallax effect for this wallpaper.
gyroTab.gyroWarning: Gyro wallpapers require specific iOS/iPadOS versions.
gyroTab.dictionaryDescription: Configure how this layer responds to device tilt. You can add up to 10 dictionaries (2 axes × 5 keyPaths) for this layer. ({count}/10)
gyroTab.noDictionariesYet: No gyro dictionaries yet. Click "+ Add Dictionary" to create one.
gyroTab.mapMinDescription: Min value (radians for rotation, px for position)
gyroTab.mapMaxDescription: Max value (radians for rotation, px for position)

replicatorTab.title: Replicator
replicatorTab.instanceCountDescription: Number of replicated instances (including the original layer)
replicatorTab.translationDescription: Translation offset for each replicated instance
replicatorTab.rotationDescription: Rotation offset for each replicated instance
replicatorTab.delayDescription: Delay between each instance appearing (for animations)

imageTab.title: Image
imageTab.dragImageHint: Drag an image here or click to upload
imageTab.cropDescription: Adjust the crop area and apply to replace the current image.

videoTab.title: Video
videoTab.gifImportHint: GIFs are automatically split into individual frames.
videoTab.videoImportHint: Import an MP4, MOV, or GIF file.
videoTab.calculationModeDescription: Linear blends frame values smoothly. Discrete jumps from one frame to the next with no interpolation.
videoTab.autoReversesDescription: When enabled, the video will play forward then backward in a loop.
videoTab.syncWithStateDescription: When enabled, the video will sync with state transitions.

textTab.title: Text
textTab.wrapDescription: When on, drag horizontal bounds to wrap text.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Let's get you started creating beautiful animated wallpapers.
onboarding.stepLayersDescription: This is the layers panel. You can add, reorder, and organize your layers here.
onboarding.stepInspectorDescription: The inspector lets you edit the properties of the selected layer.
onboarding.stepTimelineDescription: The timeline is where you create animations for your layers.
onboarding.stepExportDescription: When you're done, export your wallpaper as a .ca file.
onboarding.stepDoneDescription: Start creating by adding your first layer.
onboarding.stepLayersBody: Manage the layers in your wallpaper. Click a layer to select, duplicate or delete.
onboarding.stepStatesBody: Switch between states of what the wallpaper is in, like when your phone is in Locked, Unlocked, or in Sleep state. You can make state transitions here.
onboarding.stepCanvasBody: Drag, resize, and preview your layers. Use ⌘/+ / ⌘/- to zoom, Shift+Drag to pan.
onboarding.stepInspectorBody: Edit geometry, compositing, content, text, images, and animations for the selected layer.
onboarding.stepSettingsBody: Configure snapping behavior, see keyboard shortcuts, and reset this onboarding to view it again.

browserWarning.title: Browser Partially Supported
browserWarning.opfsWarning: Your browser does not support the Origin Private File System (OPFS), so projects are being saved to IndexedDB as a fallback. This may have performance implications.
browserWarning.opfsRecommendation: For the best experience, we recommend using a browser that supports OPFS, such as the latest version of Chrome, Edge, or Safari (not in private browsing mode).

videoLayerDialog.title: Video Layer
videoLayerDialog.description: Upload a video or GIF to create a video layer. The video will be converted to individual frames.
videoLayerDialog.sizeWarning: Warning: Layer size exceeds 30MB. This may impact performance and memory usage.
videoLayerDialog.gifAutoFps: For GIFs, the frame rate is automatically set to 15 fps for optimal performance.
videoLayerDialog.fpsNote: Note: 30 fps is recommended for optimal performance. Higher frame rates (60 fps) are better for videos synced with state transitions but will increase file size.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.noProjectsDescription: Create your first wallpaper project to get started.
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
projects.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete
projects.subtitle: Create and manage your CoreAnimation projects stored locally on your device.
projects.importChoice: Choose the type of file you want to import:
projects.importCaDescription: Import a CoreAnimation package or zip file
projects.importLinkDescription: Import a .tendies wallpaper from a URL
projects.creator: Creator
projects.deleteFromChoice: Choose where to delete the selected projects from:
projects.selectLocation: Please select at least one location to delete from.
projects.agreeTosDescription: Please review and accept our Terms of Service to use Projects while signed out. Your projects are stored locally on your device.
projects.mercuryNotSupportedDescription: Mercury Poster wallpapers cannot be imported into CAPlayground. These wallpapers store their assets in system files that cannot be modified or extracted.
projects.signInToSync: Please sign in to sync to Google Drive
projects.noProjectsToSync: No projects could be prepared for sync
projects.signInToAccessCloud: Please sign in to access cloud projects

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your cloud projects and account settings.
dashboard.awaitingReviewDescription: You can have up to five wallpapers awaiting review at a time.
dashboard.rejectedDescription: Submissions that were not accepted. These will disappear after 30 days.
dashboard.publishedDescription: Wallpapers that have been approved and are live in the gallery.
dashboard.cloudProjectsDescription: Sync and manage your projects in the cloud with Google Drive.
dashboard.signedInToDriveDescription: Your projects can be synced to the cloud
dashboard.deleteAllWarningDescription: This will permanently delete the entire CAPlayground folder and all projects from your Google Drive.
dashboard.deleteAllWarning: Warning: This action cannot be undone. All cloud projects will be permanently deleted from Drive. Projects on your device will not be affected.
dashboard.signInToDriveDescription: Once signed in, you can sync projects directly from the projects page.
dashboard.accountOptionsDescription: Manage your email, username, password, or delete your account.

account.title: Account Settings
account.name: Display Name
account.deleteWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
account.subtitle: Update your account settings and linked providers
account.linkedAccountsDescription: Sign in with any of these providers to access your account.
account.cannotChangeEmailDescription: This account uses Google sign-in. You can't change your email.
account.changePasswordDescription: For security, password changes are done via email. We'll send a reset link to your current address.
account.updateEmailDescription: We'll email a verification link to your new address. After confirming, sign back in.

wallpapers.title: Wallpaper Gallery
wallpapers.description: Browse and download wallpapers created by the community.
wallpapers.noWallpapersDescription: Be the first to submit one!
wallpapers.submitDescription: Share your creation with the community.
wallpapers.submitError: Failed to submit wallpaper. Please try again.
wallpapers.searchPlaceholder: Search wallpapers by name, creator, or description...
wallpapers.linkCopyDescription: Wallpaper link has been copied to clipboard.
wallpapers.linkCopyErrorDescription: Could not copy link to clipboard.
wallpapers.submitDescriptionExtended: Share your wallpaper with the CAPlayground community
wallpapers.signInRequiredDescription: You need to be signed in to submit wallpapers
wallpapers.pleaseSignIn: Please sign in to your account to submit wallpapers to the gallery.
wallpapers.authorDescription: Your username will be displayed as the wallpaper creator
wallpapers.previewDescription: This is how your wallpaper will appear in the gallery
wallpapers.rulesDescription: Please review and agree to the rules before submitting your wallpaper
wallpapers.rule2: Wallpapers must not consist of a single video layer. They should demonstrate creative use of CAPlayground's features.
wallpapers.rule3: No political, inappropriate, or offensive content (including but not limited to discrimination based on sex, race, or religion).
wallpapers.rule4: Ensure you have the rights to all assets used in your submission.
wallpapers.agreeToRules: I confirm that this submission is original and does not contain NSFW, political, or offensive content.
wallpapers.agreeToQuality: I confirm that this wallpaper is more than just a single video layer.
wallpapers.successDescription: Your wallpaper has been submitted as a Pull Request. Once approved, it will appear in the gallery.

signin.title: Sign In
signin.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
signin.signInDisabledDescription: Authentication is disabled in this environment because required environment variables are not set.
signin.signInDisabledDescription2: The rest of the site still works. To enable accounts, set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.errorExists: An account with this email already exists.
signup.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
signup.agreeToTerms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. You must be at least 13 years old, or the minimum age of digital consent in your country.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: Check your email for the reset link.
forgotPassword.error: No account found with that email.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.authDisabled: Password reset is disabled because authentication is not configured for this environment.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now continue to the app.
resetPassword.error: Failed to update password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.passwordLengthError: Password must be at least 8 characters

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Learn how to create animated wallpapers with CAPlayground.

contributors.title: Contributors
contributors.description: Meet the amazing developers who are building an amazing Core Animation editor for the community to make stunning wallpapers
contributors.thankYou: Thank you to all our contributors!
contributors.fetchError: Couldn't fetch contributor data from GitHub. Please try again later.
contributors.contributeDescription: CAPlayground is open source and welcomes contributions from developers around the world. Join our community and help build the future of animated wallpapers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This privacy policy explains how CAPlayground handles your data.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.description: These terms of service govern your use of CAPlayground.

footer.description: Create beautiful animated wallpapers for iOS and iPadOS.

tendiesCheck.title: Tendies Check
tendiesCheck.description: Check if your device supports .tendies wallpapers.

auth.signInPrompt: Please sign in to access this feature.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

warnings.title: Unofficial domain
warnings.unofficialDomain: You are visiting this site on an unofficial domain. For the official site, please use
warnings.betaVersion: This is a beta version. Some features may not work as expected.
warnings.mobileNotSupported: The editor is not fully supported on mobile devices. Please use a desktop browser.
